description_long: This house is a spacious, modern Mediterranean-style residence set within a walled property featuring lush landscaping and multiple outdoor amenities. The main building is two stories tall, with a mix of flat and low-pitched tiled roofs, and is surrounded by manicured lawns, tall hedges, and mature trees. The property includes a large swimming pool, a detached garage with a red-tiled roof, and a paved driveway. The house facade is finished in light-colored stucco with stone accents, and features large windows, a covered patio, and a pergola. The entryway is marked by a prominent gate and a pathway lined with shrubs, leading to a sheltered porch supported by columns. Outdoor living spaces, such as a terrace and shaded seating areas, are integrated into the landscape, providing a luxurious and inviting atmosphere.
description: A large, modern Mediterranean-style house with two stories, light stucco walls, tiled roofs, and extensive landscaped grounds including a pool and detached garage. The property is enclosed by walls and features multiple outdoor living areas and lush greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, detached garage, and lush landscaping with a clear view of the pool and patio areas.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, large windows, covered patio, and the open lawn area with trees and hedges.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the pool, terrace, and the arrangement of outdoor spaces along the property boundary.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the garage, side lawn, and the rear facade of the house with visible garden features.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and some grouped in vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a sheltered porch with columns, a decorative gate, and a pathway lined with shrubs, complemented by a tiled overhang.
